proposed_short_description: TapeTech EasyClean® Loading Pump 76TT-CA (Canada Only) Fills automatic drywall tools with joint compound through optional Gooseneck and Box Filler Fitting.
proposed_description: TapeTech EasyClean® Loading Pump 76TT-CA (Canada Only) Fills automatic drywall tools with joint compound through optional Gooseneck and Box Filler Fitting. The TapeTech Taping Tools Pump works with all major brand attachments and automatic taping and finishing tools. This pump features an Easy Clean® quick release foot valve has a twist-lock design for removal without tools. New integrated gasket design provides a better seal and makes disposable paper gaskets obsolete. The new streamlined head design makes cylinder removal and cleaning a breeze. Specially designed to increase suction, the anodized tube is also light and durable. Requires Box Filler and/or Gooseneck for filling tools (sold separately). Features: Easy Clean® Quick Release Integrated Gasket Design. Easy Clean Up Quick Release Handle Pin Designed To Increase Suction. Anodized Tube For Durability. 15.5" Length - Canada Only

proposed_description: TapeTech Nail Spotter Wheel Kit NSW01 This wheel kit is designed to make finishing faster, smoother, and less fatiguing. Compatible with both the 2" and 3" TapeTech nail spotters, this kit adds durable wheels that glide effortlessly across the wall or ceiling surface. The wheels help maintain consistent pressure and reduce drag, allowing finishers to achieve clean, professional results with greater ease. Key Features: Universal Fit – Works with both 2" and 3" TapeTech Nail Spotters for maximum versatility. Smooth Rolling Action – High-quality wheels reduce surface drag, making spotting faster and easier. Consistent Finish – Helps maintain uniform pressure for more even compound application. Durable Construction – Built with long-lasting materials to withstand daily jobsite use. Reduced Fatigue – Less effort required to move across joints means more productivity with less strain.

proposed_description: TapeTech Tool Caddy TC01TT The TapeTech Tool Caddy make filling finishing boxes with a compound tube even easier. It conveniently holds any length compound tube and filler adapter, preventing the need to place the tool on the floor or in the bucket of joint compound between fills. The Tool Caddy is light weight, durable, and securely holds any size finishing box in the perfect filling position. The Tool Caddy prevents joint compound from leaking and can be adjusted to fit almost any bucket height. The Caddy also provides a safe place to rest finishing boxes when not in use. A perfect accessory for any finisher. Use With Compound Tube When Filling Flat Boxes Durable Adjustable Design Holds Any Size Finishing Box Holds Any Length Compound Tube Fits Almost Any Bucket Height
